text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the plaza...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Halt, citizen! Have you seen any scary bad guys
around here?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I'll... take that as a no. So another peaceful day... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Hear me out! I'm suffering the worst woes a hero
could feel right now!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I love peace, and of course I wish for it from the
bottom of my heart...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: But I also really, really want to fight against some baddies! I wanna fight them and shout out my special moves while I'm at it!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: I wanna have epic battles like a real hero!
choice_data_list: You'll need to preserve your strength, then.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Awww, what? But my problem is that I don't wanna do that...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I wanna look cool fighting, just like Carrot
Ranger!
choice_data_list: And is Carrot Ranger always fighting baddies?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Of course not. She'd use up all her energy if she
was in hero mode all the time, so she's normally in
her Umamusume form to—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I guess it's pretty important for a hero to preserve
her strength too, huh!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, citizen, for teaching me such a
valuable lesson!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying I should prepare for future
battles?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Raaaah! Yeah! That sounds so cool! In order to
prepare for battles, I've gotta do some serious
training!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Like dodging tires careening down a cliff! Or
chasing after Pop's car!
choice_data_list: Don't try this at home, kids.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Relax, I won't go to such extreme lengths.
Especially since Carrot Ranger says not to do
anything dangerous either!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
All right! I don't have time to be worrying over
something so silly!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta train so that I'm ready to take on any
wrongdoer that appears! Thanks for everything!
